text: "Honestly, what matters most to me is that the writing feels real — I want donors to connect with actual stories and specific examples of impact, not just statistics or vague feel-good language. I'm pretty particular about tone: it should be warm and genuine, but never guilt-trippy or manipulative. And every piece needs a clear ask at the end — I can't stand when you read a whole newsletter and then have no idea what you're actually supposed to do next."
